title: deyeuxia pulvinata
intro: Deyeuxia pulvinata, a type of grass native to China, is a plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Deyeuxia pulvinata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Deyeuxia pulvinata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
